content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is weak — Nifty -0.95%, IT -3.56%, Pharma -1.4%, PSU Bank -1.02%, VIX +3.55% at 19.25. FII/DII flows flat, US markets closed weak overnight. Book is 72% deployed with -0.25% unrealized; priority is defense, not offense. Hysteresis rule applies: no fresh entries unless exceptional.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 6.5% but thesis intact — Q4 blockbuster (PAT +35% YoY, credit growth 22%, CASA 52.5%), analyst upgrades to Rs 88-90. CMP 76.20 still above SL 75.00. PSU bank sector weak today but structural story healthy. SL 75 is just 1.6% below CMP — acceptable risk; do not loosen or tighten."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at breakeven 984. Flipping to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. Down 1.2% on US-Iran ceasefire easing. SL 119 gives 3.7% room. VIX elevated keeps gold relevant. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1400.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high with blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%, rev +23%, EBITDA margin 26.3%). Stock has run 21% in a month, extended. Tighten SL from 1385 to 1400 (still 1.2% below CMP 1416.70) to protect against post-run profit-booking while keeping target 1520 intact. Thesis strong but extended."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high, +0.6% unrealized. Q4 audited results due Apr 25-27 — material event risk both ways. Trail SL from 1040 to breakeven 1049 to eliminate downside while preserving upside to target 1150. Stock near day's high showed selling pressure (intraday high 1079 back to 1057)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, shooting star pattern 2 days ago suggests some profit-booking. Q4 results Apr 29. SL 675 is 1.5% below CMP — already tight. Hold through results event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.3%. Q4 results Apr 30 — material catalyst. SL 2260 gives 3.5% room. Hold through event; rural recovery + Nestle's strong print bodes well for sector read-through."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 0.9%, flattish. Q4 results May 15. Summer demand catalyst intact. SL 388 gives 3.2% room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down 0.5%. Stock hit ATH Rs 212.70 yesterday, trading 18-20% ABOVE consensus target Rs 177. JM Financial expects Q4 PAT -12% YoY on Apr 29 — material sell-on-news risk. SL 205 gives 3.5% room. Considering EXIT ahead of results but holding for now since SL is close and move has been parabolic. Will re-evaluate before Apr 28."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Entry 81.50, CMP 76.20 — still above SL 75. Strong fundamentals (Q4 beat, analyst upgrades). Don't knife-catch by lowering SL; accept stop-out if triggered."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 984 from entry. No change needed. +2.7% gain. Monitor for +4% to trail higher toward 990."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL 119 gives adequate room. Ceasefire easing weighs short-term but structural demand intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1400.00,
      "reasoning": "Blockbuster Q4, +21% MTD — extended. Raise SL from 1385 to 1400 to protect against profit-taking; still 1.2% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in 1-3 days = binary event. Trail to breakeven 1049 to eliminate downside while retaining upside to 1150 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, Q4 results Apr 29. SL 675 already tight at 1.5%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 30. SL 2260 at 3.5% distance appropriate for event hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "No meaningful move to trail. SL 388 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Parabolic move, earnings Apr 29 with bearish consensus. SL 205 at 3.5%. Will reassess for pre-event EXIT on Apr 28. No tighten today as SL is already close to entry."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ABSLAMC — Q4 PAT -18% YoY, CIO resignation — AVOID despite intraday strength (likely dividend arbitrage moves). HUDCO — downtrend intact, governance issues, BEARISH per research — AVOID. COCHINSHIP/GRSE/HSCL/EMCURE/CLEAN/ATUL — no fresh entries given 72% deployment and CAUTIOUS bias. ICICIBANK — watch for stabilization post-results; if private bank sector finds floor, could be defensive add next cycle. DRREDDY — heavy volume flush, wait for stabilization.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 72% deployed with -0.25% total P&L on Day 5. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default is NO new entries — focus on managing 9 existing positions. Heavy earnings week ahead: AUBANK (Apr 25-27), ADANIPOWER (Apr 29), GRANULES (Apr 29), HINDUNILVR (Apr 30), NTPC (May 15). Trailed SLs on AUBANK and NESTLEIND to reduce event risk. Financials cluster exposure (MAHABANK+PNBHOUSING+AUBANK) ~24% of capital — at cluster cap, no more additions. Power cluster (NTPC+ADANIPOWER) ~9% — acceptable. FMCG (NESTLEIND+HINDUNILVR) ~17% — appropriate defensive allocation. VIX at 19.25 + IT rout suggests caution warranted."
}
